allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''keys:'''', list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else ''''not dict''''\); print\(''''name:'''', d.get\(''''name'''',''''N/A''''\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else ''''N/A''''\); print\(''''meta:'''', d.get\(''''meta'''',''''N/A''''\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else ''''N/A''''\)")

Bash(node -e "fetch\(''''http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/pages/home''''\).then\(r=>r.json\(\)\).then\(d=>{console.log\(''''top keys:'''', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''''name:'''', d.name\); console.log\(''''meta:'''', d.meta\)}\)")
